activeOnly.title: Active Only
activeOnly.description:
Set to true to show only active users. Set to false to 
include inactive users too. Default is true.

credFilter.title: CRED Filter
credFilter.description:
Filter by access level. Use full_access to show only 
users with Create plus Read plus Edit plus Delete. Use 
modify_all to show users with Modify All Records. Use 
delete to show users with Delete access. Use all to show 
all users with any access.

objectName.title: Object Name
objectName.description:
The Salesforce object API name to analyze. Can be any 
standard object like Account, Contact, Opportunity, Case, 
Lead, Task, Event, Campaign, Order, Product2, Contract, 
User, or any custom object ending in __c

profileFilter.title: Profile Filter
profileFilter.description:
Filter results to show only users with a specific profile. 
Use the profile name like System Administrator or Standard 
User or Sales Manager. Use all to show users from all profiles
